name: Use of a Key Past its Expiration Date
description: The product uses a cryptographic key or password past its expiration date. Prolonged key usage increases the window for cryptanalytic attacks and diminishes the safety guarantees the key was designed to provide.
detection_pattern: Look for TRANSFORM nodes (encryption, decryption, signing) that consume key material from STORAGE nodes (key store, credential store) without a CONTROL mediator (expiration check, key rotation policy, validity period enforcement) that verifies the key has not exceeded its intended lifetime before use.
